description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring a plush, tufted design across both the seat and backrest surfaces. The sofa includes three main seating sections, with a chaise lounge extension on one end and a corner seat connecting the two arms. The backrests and seat cushions are generously padded, with visible button tufting that adds a classic, textured appearance. Two square throw pillows and one rectangular pillow, all in matching or slightly lighter tones, are placed on the sofa for added comfort and visual interest. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily cushioned, matching the overall plush aesthetic. The sofa sits on short, barely visible legs, giving it a low-profile stance suitable for modern or contemporary urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped light gray sectional sofa with tufted cushions, plush armrests, and a chaise lounge extension. Includes matching throw pillows and a low-profile design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, chaise lounge on the right, and all three throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the rounded, padded armrest on the near side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's low-profile legs.
description_view_3: End view focusing on the back and side of the chaise lounge, with the armrest and cushion arrangement visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions, all attached and uniformly sized, with deep button tufting; includes three loose throw pillows.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and heavily padded armrests at both ends, slightly higher than the seat, with a plush, overstuffed profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and possibly central points, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with attached, deeply tufted cushions, forming a seamless L-shape around the sofa.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a prominent tufted texture and button detailing, no visible decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
